## Checklist

- [ ] No literal non-ASCII characters in `.cpp`/`.h` files (use `\uXXXX` escapes)
- [ ] `.rc` files were edited as UTF-16 LE only
- [ ] Language INI files updated if new user-visible strings were added
- [ ] `SECURITY.md` consulted if this touches network, file I/O, or privilege handling
